scripts.release:dry: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run pack:all
scripts.publish:all: npm run clean && npm run build && npm publish -w @yinuo-ngm/core --access public && npm publish -w @yinuo-ngm/server --access public && npm publish -w @yinuo-ngm/cli --access public && npm publish -w @yinuo-ngm/ais --access public
scripts.pack:all: npm pack ./packages/storage && npm pack ./packages/core &&npm pack ./packages/api && npm pack ./packages/sprite && npm pack ./packages/server && npm pack ./packages/cli && npm pack ./packages/ais
